channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AI Chip Startup Etched Achieves $10.3B Valuation Despite Skepticism
item.description: Etched, an AI chip startup founded by three Harvard dropouts in 2022, has secured a $300 million Series C funding round at a $10.3 billion valuation, led by Sequoia and joined by Andreessen Horowitz, ...

item.title: SA Reserve Bank announces interest rates decision amid inflation concerns
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank’s Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) is set to announce its latest interest rates decision on Thursday, July 23, 2026. This decision comes amid persistent inflationary pres...

item.title: Students Stage Peaceful Demonstration at Jantar Mantar Against Government Policies
item.description: A significant protest has taken place at the iconic Jantar Mantar site in Delhi, where students and activists gathered to voice their concerns over recent government policies. The demonstration, organ...

item.title: Water Main Break Causes Flooding in Calgary's Macleod Trail Area
item.description: A water main break in Calgary has led to significant flooding along Macleod Trail south, displacing residents and causing damage to infrastructure. The incident occurred on July 23, 2026, prompting em...

item.title: Kenyan Creator Earns KSh 6k from 11 Million Facebook Views
item.description: Kenyan digital creator Being Wendy revealed that her content reaching over 11 million views on Facebook earned just KSh 6,000 in a month, shocking followers and fellow creators. Known for viral topics...

item.title: Public Protector Report Highlights Systemic Food Safety Failures in Gauteng Spaza Shops
item.description: The Public Protector's preliminary findings into food safety failures in Gauteng spaza shops reveal alarming conditions that contributed to at least 23 child deaths from suspected food poisoning in 20...

item.title: US Congress Divided on Iran War Powers as Senate Supports Trump
item.description: The US House of Representatives passed a resolution directing President Donald Trump to halt military action against Iran without congressional approval, while the Senate blocked a similar measure. Th...

item.title: Arrest of Dawlah Bomb Maker Linked to Terrorist Training
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) and military forces successfully arrested Muslimin Sangila Amilil, a suspected bomb maker associated with the militant group Dawlah Islamiyah. Amilil, who was prev...

item.title: Healthcare Training in Africa Must Embrace Family and Community Involvement
item.description: The article discusses how healthcare professional training in Africa often relies on Western models that prioritize individualism, which may not align with local practices where family and community p...

item.title: UDSM Vice Chancellor Joins International Confucian Association
item.description: Prof William Anangisye, the Vice Chancellor of the University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM), has been admitted as an Individual Member of the International Confucian Association (ICA). This recognition high...

item.title: Arthur Elgort's Photographic Style Captured Stephanie Seymour's Rise as a Supermodel in the 1980s
item.description: Stephanie Seymour, born on July 23, 1968, was one of the most iconic supermodels of the 1980s and 1990s. Her career took off during the 1980s, featuring in the Sports Illustrated Swimsuit Issue and th...

item.title: Tanzania Central Bank promotes digital payments to curb counterfeit currency
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) has called on residents of Geita Region to adopt digital payment systems to combat counterfeit currency. The initiative, highlighted during a seminar on banknote care and co...

item.title: Athletes Withdraw from Commonwealth Games Amid Injury Concerns and Event Challenges
item.description: The Commonwealth Games in Glasgow have faced significant setbacks as several high-profile athletes withdraw from the event. Olympic silver medallist Katarina Johnson-Thompson has pulled out due to inj...

item.title: NRL Round 21 Highlights: Eels vs Panthers Match Recap
item.description: The NRL Round 21 clash between the Western Sydney-based Eels and Panthers delivered a thrilling Thursday night showdown at CommBank Stadium. The match, which saw old rivals face off, featured standout...

item.title: Oscar Piastri axed by McLaren ahead of crucial Hungarian Grand Prix testing
item.description: The article discusses the decision by McLaren to ax Oscar Piastri ahead of the crucial Hungarian Grand Prix testing. Piastri, a young Australian driver, was part of McLaren's test program, but the tea...

item.title: Floods in Gilgit-Baltistan Disrupt Travel, Damage Infrastructure
item.description: Torrential rains in Gilgit-Baltistan have caused widespread travel disruptions, with flash floods and landslides washing away roads and bridges, leaving thousands stranded. The Pakistan Meteorological...

item.title: Treefrog mating strategy boosts nest survival through male collaboration
item.description: African grey foam-nest treefrogs (Chiromantis xerampelina) display unique reproductive behaviors where females mate with multiple males to improve nest quality. Research shows that polyandry, once tho...

item.title: Wildfire-Generated Pyrocumulus Clouds Observed Over British Columbia
item.description: A wildfire near Anderson Creek in British Columbia has produced massive pyrocumulus clouds, visible as cauliflower-like formations hundreds of kilometers away. The Anderson Creek fire was discovered b...

item.title: Cardi B Reacts to Rumors About Her Relationship With Nigerian Footballer Maduka Okoye
item.description: Cardi B has addressed rumors about her relationship with Nigerian goalkeeper Maduka Okoye after photos of them together in Italy sparked a media frenzy. The situation escalated when Okoye's baby mama,...

item.title: Governor Bago Urges Fulani Community To Work With Security Agencies Against Criminals In Niger State
item.description: Niger State Governor, Umaru Mohammed Bago, has called on members of the Fulani community to cooperate fully with security agencies as part of efforts to tackle insecurity across the state. Speaking du...
